evidence_notes: Judged only catalog/owned_repair_batch68.json BOYLAT lateral buoy Chart No.1 parity repairs.

Used row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/S-101/OpenCPN source-table references, chart1_parity_gate, Helm before/after SVG/renders, and all local reference candidates available in the source variant matrix.

Pass requires the strict body family specified for this repair batch: BOYLAT13/14/51 conical; BOYLAT23/24/50/52/53/54/55/56 can/cylindrical/trapezoid-like; BOYLAT25 spherical; BOYLAT26/27 spar/pillar-like.
Pass also requires ordered load-bearing colours and visible band counts; this artifact grants zero final approvals.
